overall.description: Third-person gameplay from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt approaching a nighttime forest campsite with a bonfire and NPCs, then continuing down a dark wooded trail. The scene features atmospheric blue moonlight and warm firelight contrast.

events.description: wooden camp shelter with warm firelight becomes visible ahead through the trees

agents.ego_description: walking along the forest path toward the lit campsite in the distance

notable_agents.action: villagers gathered near the campfire under the wooden shelter

entered.detail: open-air wooden pavilion with thatched roof and support posts
warm orange light emanating from the distant fire
narrow winding trail through grass and pine trees

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dark forest path at night, approaching a distant campsite. The wooden shelter with its warm firelight becomes visible through the trees ahead, contrasting with the cool blue moonlight of the forest.

scene_state.functional_zone: campsite with bonfire and gathering NPCs

events.description: entering the warm flickering illumination of the large campfire
circling around the right side of the bonfire to pass through the camp

agents.ego_description: walking around the campfire and observing the gathered NPCs before continuing past them

notable_agents.action: woman in red dress standing with arms crossed near the fire
man in green tunic gesturing toward the bonfire

entered.detail: large burning campfire with visible flames and rising smoke
rustic wooden log seating arranged around the fire
group of villagers gathered around the fire including a seated figure

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters the campsite beneath the wooden shelter, passing close to the large bonfire and the gathered villagers. The warm firelight illuminates the NPCs as he circles around them to continue on the path.

events.description: leaving the campsite and re-entering the darker forest away from the firelight
path curves gently to the right winding deeper into the woods

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the winding forest path away from the camp into the deeper woods

entered.detail: tall pine and deciduous trees creating a dense canopy overhead
simple wooden post fence marking the path boundary
gnarled old oak tree with spreading branches over the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt leaves the campsite behind and enters the deeper forest, the warm firelight fading into the cool blue darkness. He continues along the winding dirt path surrounded by dense trees and occasional wooden fences as the trail curves through the woods.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a moonlit forest that briefly transitions into a warm, inhabited campsite before returning to the deep nocturnal woods. It begins with Geralt walking along a dark forest path, where the cool blue moonlight gradually gives way to the distant, warm glow of a wooden shelter. As he enters the campsite, the camera moves close to a large bonfire and gathered villagers, bathing the scene in bright orange light. The perspective then shifts as Geralt circles the group and leaves the shelter behind, causing the warm firelight to fade back into the oppressive blue darkness. Finally, the scene expands into the deeper forest, following a winding dirt path lined with dense trees and wooden fences as the trail curves further into the night.
